perturbation.original_text: Horst Entertainment agrees to pay Galactcomm $0.01 (one cent) per access up to 400,000 accesses thereafter payment shall be $0.005 (one-half cent) per access.
perturbation.changed_text: Horst Entertainment agrees to pay Galactcomm a mutually agreed upon amount per access.
perturbation.explanation: The change replaces the specific payment amounts ($0.01 and $0.005) with 'a mutually agreed upon amount'. This creates uncertainty because the original contract stipulates specific amounts; this change implies that the payment can change and that there isn't necessarily a constant payment, or that the payment is yet to be determined or will be agreed upon on a later date. This creates an in-text contradiction because the original contract refers to specific amounts and this is changed to 'a mutually agreed amount', which will affect the enforcement of the access fees and creates uncertainty.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Horst Entertainment agrees to pay Galactcomm a mutually agreed upon amount per access. Horst Entertainment shall send this amount to Galacticomm by no later than Wednesday for accesses used from the previuos week (Monday thru Sunday).
perturbation.justification: The original text specifies exact payment amounts, while the changed text introduces the concept of a 'mutually agreed upon amount', creating uncertainty regarding the payment amount. The contradicted text repeats the 'mutually agreed upon amount' which conflicts with the specificity of the original agreement and creates ambiguity in enforcement of access fees. Therefore, this aligns with the Omissions - In Text Contradiction type, because essential language is removed or altered in one section, creating a contradiction with obligations or constraints stated in other sections, where the specific payment amounts were removed, creating a contradiction with the previously agreed upon payment amount.

perturbation.original_text: Galacticomm must provide a person(s) to correct any technical problems (Server being down or inaccessible) 24 hours per day, 7 days per week. This person(s) must be available by beeper or telephone.
perturbation.changed_text: Galacticomm will endeavor to address any technical problems.
perturbation.explanation: The specific requirement for 24/7 technical support and the availability of personnel via beeper or telephone has been removed. This introduces uncertainty because 'endeavor to address' is vague and does not guarantee round-the-clock support or a rapid response. It will create an internal contradiction within the text as Galacticomm, in a previous version, had a specific responsibility which is now being undermined.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Galacticomm will endeavor to address any technical problems. Horst Entertainment shall provide this same 24 hour service at the broadcast location.
perturbation.justification: The original text imposed a strict 24/7 support obligation on Galacticomm. The changed text, "Galacticomm will endeavor to address any technical problems," weakens this obligation significantly by making it non-binding. The contradicted text repeats this weakened obligation. This creates a contradiction because the explicit and guaranteed 24/7 support implied by the original text is no longer assured. The 'endeavor to address' language allows for interpretation and doesn't guarantee the same level of service, directly conflicting with the previous commitment. This aligns with the 'Omissions – In Text Contradiction' definition, where essential language is removed, creating a conflict.

perturbation.original_text: In the event Galacticomm, Inc. chooses to terminate this agreement, Horst Entertainment Inc. will have the right to purchase a license copy of the software in the amount of $15,000.00.
perturbation.changed_text: In the event Galacticomm, Inc. chooses to terminate this agreement, Horst Entertainment Inc. may negotiate the purchase of a license copy of the software.
perturbation.explanation: By changing the definitive right to purchase a license for a fixed amount ($15,000) to a negotiation, it creates an in-text contradiction as the original right is clearly defined but now replaced with vagueness. It will affect the agreement termination clause as it opens up for other interpretations about purchasing the license when the original text stated clearly that Horst Entertainment has the right to purchase the software at a fixed cost, and this has been changed.
perturbation.contradicted_text: In the event Galacticomm, Inc. chooses to terminate this agreement, Horst Entertainment Inc. may negotiate the purchase of a license copy of the software. All parties have read and fully agree to all terms and conditions as set forth in this Web Hosting Agreement.
perturbation.justification: The original text grants Horst Entertainment Inc. a definitive right to purchase a software license for $15,000 upon termination by Galacticomm, Inc. The changed text replaces this right with the option to negotiate the purchase, creating a contradiction. The contradicted text is in the same sentence. This introduces ambiguity and conflicts with the original definite right, making the terms of license purchase uncertain, creating a strong contradiction that would cause confusion.
